name: NovoCure Ltd
business: NovoCure Ltd is a global oncology company with a proprietary platform technology called Tumor Treating Fields (TTFields), which are electric fields that exert physical forces to kill cancer cells, delivered through a medical device. The company markets its products (Optune Gio, Optune Lua, Optune Pax) in multiple countries, with the majority of revenues coming from Optune Gio in the U.S., Germany, France, and Japan.
sellsTo: medical oncologists, specialty oncologists focused on treatment of the brain, thorax or abdomen, and radiation oncologists

exposures.sentence: We are a global oncology company with a proprietary platform technology called Tumor Treating Fields ("TTFields"), which are electric fields that exert physical forces to kill cancer cells. Our therapy is delivered through a medical device.

catalysts.event: Topline data from TRIDENT Phase 3 trial in newly diagnosed GBM
catalysts.sentence: Topline data from the TRIDENT trial is anticipated in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline data from PANOVA-4 Phase 2 trial in metastatic pancreatic cancer
catalysts.sentence: Topline data from the PANOVA-4 trial is anticipated in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of enrollment for KEYNOTE D58 Phase 3 trial in newly diagnosed GBM
catalysts.sentence: KEYNOTE D58 is currently open and enrolling, and we anticipate completing enrollment by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: PMA submission for Optune Mya (brain metastases from NSCLC)
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025 we submitted the final module of the PMA, seeking approval under the proposed brand name Optune Mya.

catalysts.event: FDA acceptance of PMA for Optune Mya for substantive review
catalysts.sentence: The PMA has been accepted as filed by the FDA, and is under substantive review.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 15,000 people will be diagnosed with GBM or tumors that typically progress to GBM in the U.S. annually, of which about 8,200 are candidates for Optune Gio.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2026, we estimate that annually approximately: 15,000 people will be diagnosed with GBM or tumors that typically progress to GBM in the U.S. Of this population, approximately 8,200 patients are candidates for treatment with Optune Gio and will actively seek treatment.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 114,000 people will be diagnosed with metastatic NSCLC in the U.S. annually, of which about 30,000 are candidates for second-line Optune Lua.
tamClaims.sentence: 114,000 people will be diagnosed with metastatic NSCLC in the U.S. We estimate that approximately 30,000 patients are candidates for second-line treatment with Optune Lua and will actively seek therapy.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 60,000 people will be diagnosed with pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma in the U.S. annually, of which about 15,000 are candidates for first-line Optune Pax.
tamClaims.sentence: 60,000 people will be diagnosed with pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma in the U.S. We estimate that approximately 15,000 patients are candidates for first-line treatment with Optune Pax and will actively seek therapy.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 16,000 patients meet the METIS trial criteria and will actively seek treatment for brain metastases from NSCLC in the U.S. annually.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that approximately 16,000 patients meet the criteria of the METIS trial and will actively seek treatment in the U.S. annually.
